items.description: Reviews campaign performance and proposes daily budget and creative actions.

items.name: eve/a11y-auditor

items.description: Crawls key pages, runs axe-style accessibility checks in a real browser, and reports WCAG violations grouped by user harm with proposed read-only fixes.

items.name: flue/a11y-auditor
items.title: Accessibility Auditor Agent (flue)
items.description: Crawls key pages, runs axe-style accessibility checks in a real browser, and reports WCAG violations grouped by user harm with proposed read-only fixes.

items.title: Adversarial Reviewer Agent (eve)
items.description: Reads a GitHub pull request and its diff and returns an independent, skeptical second-opinion review.

items.name: flue/adversarial-reviewer
items.title: Adversarial Reviewer Agent (flue)
items.description: Reads a GitHub pull request and its diff and returns an independent, skeptical second-opinion review.

items.description: Pulls key event trends from PostHog and writes a plain-language weekly digest for operators.

items.name: flue/analytics-digest

items.description: Pulls key event trends from PostHog and writes a plain-language weekly digest for operators.

items.description: Drafts clean-room restore-and-verify plans for required recovery scenarios and reports backup coverage gaps for operator review (read-only).

items.title: Blog Writer Agent (flue)
items.description: Drafts long-form SEO articles from a keyword brief: outline, draft with internal-link suggestions, and SEO checks for operator approval.

items.name: flue/buyer-voice
items.title: Buyer Voice Agent (flue)
items.description: Mines repeated buyer objections from call and ticket notes and drafts landing-page copy in customers' own words for operator approval.

items.description: Reads recent Discord channel messages and drafts doc-grounded answers for operator approval, escalating hard ones.

items.description: Crawls the app with a native browser to find user-facing error messages, confirms which states are reachable, and drafts clearer, more empathetic rewrites for operator approval.

items.description: Acts like a first-time developer: follows the project's README and clean setup from scratch, stops at the first blocker, and reports the exact doc or script fix needed without changing anything.

items.title: Performance Auditor Agent (flue)
items.description: Runs a weekly browser-driven performance audit, measures page load timings and transfer weight, identifies the single worst bottleneck, and proposes a behavior-preserving fix.

items.title: PR Pitcher Agent (flue)
items.description: Matches journalist source requests to this project's expertise and drafts quotable pitch responses for operator approval.

items.description: Turns recent product updates into a short, source-grounded podcast script and ElevenLabs audio plan for operator approval.

items.title: Reddit Radar Agent (flue)
items.description: Monitors target subreddits and keywords, ranks relevant threads by fit and reach, and drafts non-spammy replies for operator approval.

items.name: flue/refund-chaser
items.title: Refund Chaser Agent (flue)
items.description: Tracks open Stripe refunds and disputes and drafts the next follow-up until each one is resolved.

items.name: flue/repo-janitor
items.title: Repo Janitor Agent (flue)
items.description: Plans proven low-risk repository cleanups one at a time (stale files, dead code, lint debt) and leaves uncertain work alone. Read-only and draft-first.

items.title: Research Assistant Agent (flue)
items.description: Turns a focused question into a sourced, cited brief for a real decision using the framework's native web and fetch capability, with adversarial source verification and no paid search APIs.

items.description: Watches new product reviews from the source the operator configures, drafts on-brand responses, and flags detractors for operator approval.

items.description: Reads recent Slack channel updates and drafts a daily standup digest of priorities, threads, and wins for operator approval.

items.description: Reads open Intercom conversations and drafts grounded replies for operator approval, escalating hard cases.

items.title: Test Writer Agent (flue)

items.description: Reads a Linear ticket and drafts a reviewer-ready reproduction, implementation plan, and test plan for a PR.

items.title: Uptime Monitor Agent (flue)
items.description: Checks operator-supplied endpoints for status, latency, and expected content, then returns a read-only health report.

items.title: Value Propagation Agent (flue)
items.description: Plans a read-only audit to find every stale copy of a changed value across code, docs, and config, then proposes a per-file fix diff for operator approval.
